title: More Crafting Tables!
description: Make your crafting table no longer ruin your decoration!
body:
![Logo saying More Crafting Tables](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_ce377bcd-df70-4a89-835f-dc96c7a1853a.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**DON'T LET YOUR CRAFTING TABLE RUIN YOUR DECORATION ANY MORE**

**Create each type of Crafting Table with its corresponding wood, adapting and giving more variety to these, expanding the possibilities of decoration and so on**

This mod requires **Forge** or **NeoForge** and it is a port from a mod made for Fabric called [**Oh, How the Crafting Has Tabled**!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-how-the-crafting-has-tabled)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/710690225629823030/774357446495699054/picture.png)![Displaying Jungle, Acacia, Birch, Spruce and Dark Oak Tables](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_39e73642-855f-4505-9c99-af80faa71281.png)

**Also with Nether Planks! (Not flamable)**![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/800415038929764372/800417971549765683/unknown.png)

![Displaying Crimson table](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_7c2810af-d780-4104-9709-3e8694ecfcaa.png)

![Displaying Warped table next to an Enderman](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_6cf61b06-4e56-49f3-9585-945d3f3486e1.png)

Supports [**Biomes O' Plenty**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) on all versions

![Displaying all tables for Biomes o'Plenty mod](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_f8013f4f-4408-45b0-b35f-e4b0e7eecd39.png)

**NOW INCLUDES DYED COLOR VARIANTS FOR THE OAK CRAFTING TABLES:**

**![Displaying all dyable oak crafting tables](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_cb486fb3-0610-4650-887f-9c3246879519.png)**

**Recipes:**

![Gif cycling through recipes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/417365/description_bbc78ba8-5e46-43d2-8f2d-379386645e52.gif)

**__Supports mods like:__** 

*   [**Atmospheric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric)
*   [**Traverse**](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse)
*   [**The Twilight Forest**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
*   [**Botania**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
*   [**Forbidden and Arcanus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus)
*   [**Tinkers Construct**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)
*   [**Chaos Awakens**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chaos-awakens)
*   [**Blue Skies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)
*   [**Outer End**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-outer-end)
*   [**Abundance**](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundance)
*   [**Ars Nouveau**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
*   [**Environmental**](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)
*   [**Extended Nether Backport**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-nether-backport)

Disclaimer: Not all mods listed above will be supported in newer versions. Support depends entirely on the availability of the mods

**Tittle inspired by [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)**

**Added support for korean language thanks to [8523761](https://www.curseforge.com/members/8523761/projects)**

**Added support for Russian language thanks to** **[Rexschwert](https://www.curseforge.com/members/rexschwert/projects)**

**Added support for Ukrainian language thanks to** **[ProSplash1](https://www.curseforge.com/members/prosplash1/projects)**
